Transcript:



Fastest way to healthy arteries.

Eating too much salt causes hypertension, right?

Nope.

What about too much bacon and red meat?

Nope.

It's actually calcium buildup that turns arteries to stone.

Do this to clear calcified arteries fast.

Every 40 seconds, boom, another American has a heart attack and most of them received a clean bill of health from their doctor.

Dr. Louis M.D., an award-winning lipidologist, he wanted to know why thousands of seemingly healthy people are dying without warning.

What he found shocked the medical community, because the real killer is not hypertension or cholesterol.

It was something far more insidious, a condition called coronary artery calcification.

But the heart specialists, they got a more accurate name for it, stone heart syndrome, because that's literally what happens.

I mean, your arteries, they turn to stone, blocking blood flow to your heart.

Dr. Louis explains it like this, inside your arteries is a smooth Teflon-like coating that allows blood to flow freely.

It's kind of like a brand new hose, smooth, flexible, perfect flow, sending vital nutrients and oxygen to your organs and tissues.

But over time, stress, meds, inflammatory foods, aging, it's going to cause tiny tears in the smooth coating.

And then your body tries to patch them up with plaque.

Problem is, it doesn't know when to stop.

And that's scary enough.

But then something even worse happens.

Calcium, yes, the same stuff that makes your bones and teeth hard, starts getting trapped in this plaque, like debris caught in a filter.

It starts silently in your toes, where you don't notice, and it creeps upward, slowly turning arteries stiff as stone.

And that is lethal.

Why?

Your arteries, they gotta be able to expand and contract to regulate blood pressure and control the blood flow.

Without that flexibility, you literally die.

According to the Cleveland Clinic, by the age of 70, a whopping 90% of men and 67% of women have stone heart syndrome.

And for years, doctors thought this was just a part of getting old.

Then this happened.

Groundbreaking research revealed stone heart syndrome is a disease that literally transforms your arteries into rigid bone-like tubes.

And it gets worse.

In some cases, jagged rock-like nodules form in the most dangerous places, the arteries leading to your heart.

When these rocky formations rupture through your artery walls, it is game over.

They trigger instant blood clots that are catastrophic.

Scariest part is, you won't even feel it happening.

One minute you're fine.

Then the next, you're clutching your chest, struggling to breathe, wondering if these moments are going to be your last.

This exact scenario happens to 805,000 Americans every single year.

And the number is growing.

So what do you do?

Well, I can tell you it's not about eating less salt or exercising more.

Sure, those things might lower your numbers, but they don't clear the blockage.

Here's the good news.

Dr. Lewis developed a simple but powerful way to help flush your arteries, improve blood flow, and support overall heart health.

All you need is seven seconds each and it's so safe and effective, you can do it from the comfort of your own home.

It doesn't matter if you're 30, 70, whatever.

Thousands of Americans are using this at-home method to clear out hardened arteries and maintain healthy blood pressure.
